hero.headline: Precision. Beauty. Confidence.
hero.subtitle: I create fabulous brows with symmetric results and 100% on-tone harmonious pigment — from fine cashmere blonde shades to the boldest tones. The expressiveness and symmetry of your face deserve the best brows.

services.label: Services
services.heading: Styling. Lamination. Bleaching.
services.description: Every session guarantees symmetric results and 100% on-tone harmonious pigment — disciplined brows straight from the magazine pages, plus creative bleaching from fine cashmere blonde to the boldest brown or black tones.

shaping.name: Brow Styling
shaping.desc: Contouring and defining brows with tweezers and thread, tinting with dye or henna, and thinning unruly hairs for an airy, harmonious brow.

lamination.name: Lamination
lamination.desc: Complex lamination & styling treatment for defined, thick, well-groomed brows lasting 4–6 weeks. Also available for lashes — natural elongation and curl effect, lasting 6–8 weeks.

bleaching.name: Bleaching & Toning
bleaching.desc: Brow bleaching evens out colour and creates a bright, modern look. Paired with toning for the desired shade — from fine cashmere blonde to bold brown or black tones.

pricelist.label: Transparent Pricing
pricelist.heading: Price List
pricelist.description: Professional treatments tailored to enhance your natural beauty. Every session is an investment in yourself.
pricelist.footnote: Lamination must not be performed sooner than 3 months between sessions and is not suitable on trimmed or coarse hair. Henna is not recommended on dry skin.

items.lashLaminationBrowStyling: Lash Lamination + Brow Styling with Dye

gallery.label: Portfolio
gallery.heading: Gallery
gallery.description: Real results, real transformations. Every brow tells a story.

courses.label: Education
courses.heading: Learn from the Best
courses.description: Turn your passion for brows into a thriving career with Ilknur's hands-on training programs.

location.label: Our Studio
location.heading: Your transformation space
location.description: A modern, welcoming studio designed with your comfort and relaxation in mind.
location.parkingNote: Parking is available in the vicinity of the studio.

footer.tagline: The brow fairy — creating fabulous brows and passionately teaching styling courses.
